message: Warming audit: fixed 5 grouped issues (#98-#102) — scheduling/ban-risk, board indicators, cycle resilience, localization, channel feedback — plus 6 review-found bugs (reconcile aborting quarantine recovery, cap=1 lockout, trust-ceiling progress, one-sided faded-pair DMs, case-sensitive invite dedup, stale doc). 536 tests green, coverage>=90%.

PR #104 accounts QA audit: fixed 15 findings. H2/M1 — single-source RU localization (service emits raw AccountStatus + RU relative time; UI _account_status_label is the only translation point; deleted English _status_label). H1 — UI sends username=None when unchanged (no USERNAME_NOT_MODIFIED). H3 — error snapshots no longer cached. M2 footer hides only on success; M3 story kind inferred from extension (dropdown removed); M4 delete errors translated; M5 search debounce; M6 uploader CSS scoped to .tb-profile-dialog. All gates green, +6 tests (543 pass).
Нейрокомментинг: дизайн прогрилен (grill), архитектурное решение в decisions.md; на трекере созданы 4 milestone (Ф0-Ф3) + 7 issues #113-119 (Ф0 спайк-гейт + Ф1 MVP).

Ф1 neurocomment (#114-#119) смёржен в main: 6 стек-PR #122->#127, squash снизу вверх, каждый CI-зелёный (lint/ty/pytest-strict/aislop/semgrep/pip-audit). #124<->#126 is_forward add/add (squash стёр общую #116-историю) разрешён тривиально — листенер/схема/тест byte-identical к смёрженному листенеру, поэтому #126 лёг как verified engine-only diff. Живая канарейка (#119) и решение капчи (#120) оставлены оператору (HITL), не запускались.

neurocomment Ф2 #136: un-assign реализован repo-direct (remove_account_from_campaign — hard DELETE m2m, scoped по паре, no cascade т.к. readiness шарится между кампаниями), БЕЗ сервиса: тонкий campaign-CRUD идёт через core.db напрямую как assign/link/deactivate; pass-through-сервис был бы shallow-модулем (grill-решение, оператор делегировал выбор).

neurocomment Ф2 #136 (branch claude/peaceful-bhabha-e08f72, НЕ в main по просьбе оператора): un-assign аккаунта + мультикампанийный ui.select-переключатель. test-first (grill→tdd). 796 тестов зелёные, ruff/ty/aislop/format чисто, branch-cov >=90%. Пост-ревью 3 субагентами: без blocker/major; убраны 2 минорные избыточности (per-switch on_disconnect accumulation, redundant listener-null guard).

neurocomment #136 пост /code-review (max-effort): 2 громкие находки опровергнуты source-verify NiceGUI 3.13 (set_options сам чистит stale-value → listener-guard лишний; section.refresh пробросил бы event → on_switch wrapper нужен). Исправлены 2 минорных (дефолт переключателя -> campaigns[-1]; восстановлен on_disconnect-teardown таймера = конвенция репо). 1 major altitude: per-campaign Start/Stop поверх fleet-global слушателя -> caption-mitigation + follow-up #137 (вынос контролов на уровень флота). 796 тестов зелёные.

neurocomment #137 (altitude из код-ревью): per-campaign Start/Stop поверх fleet-global слушателя -> вынес listener+Запустить/Остановить в единый _render_runtime_controls (рендер один раз, listener из всех аккаунтов); per-campaign секция = каналы+аккаунты+онбординг; on_toggle упрощён (убрана listener-sync связка). Реализовано в ветке (коммит 048c49a), Closes #137.

Make-it-real epic (design to backend) merged to main via PR #190 (squash 4088748): proxy pool, trust/device/spam, edit-card checks, phone-code login + logout/reset, warming card log, neuro feed/captcha/board, neuro settings wired into the engine, profile edit + photo upload, proxy-delete confirm + account-delete FK fix. CI 7/7 green. Remaining de-mock items (warmed list, pool assign from card, story/music posting, neuro comment text, manual captcha) tracked for a follow-up /goal session.

feat/finish-design-backend (#191): removed all remaining frontend mocks — warming graduation (promote/unpromote + warmed list), ready-card proxy/flag/trust, AccountEdit proxy assign, +Account wizard import+assign, .session/tdata dropzone, profile media (photos/stories/music via base64 view), NC comment text, captcha solver toggle->solver_enabled + Пройти->retry, delete-campaign/channel-x/edit-prompt, account-delete. No new migration. 852 backend + 111 FE tests; 6/7 CI green; semgrep red = pre-existing infra drift (separate task).

2026-07-10 audit session. ponytail-audit found the repo lean (no dead code/deps/debt). Targeted complexity refactor merged (#207): AccountEdit 1274->~85 and NeurocommentPage 1408->~570 split into co-located ui/ siblings; warming start_warming C17->A, _run_chat_step C12->B, _read_and_react 5-tuple->dataclass. Item 3 (telegram dispatchers) dropped as net-negative churn. Then a parallel bug audit + fixes merged (#209): 4 MED (warming target-gate skips quarantine/flood_wait, neurocomment in-flight dedup read live, set_account_photo 400 not 500, decode_session_claims rejects empty AUTH__SECRET) + 2 LOW hardening (tdata-zip streams+counts real bytes vs declared, phone_geo loguru %s->{}). 1071 tests green, CI 7/7. Deferred: daily-cap ~2x on mid-cycle restart -> issue #208; six other low findings judged not-worth-fixing.

2026-07-11 feature: phone-number authentication as a 3rd add-account method (branch phone-authentication). Reused the existing phone-code gateway/service/cache + request-code/submit-code endpoints (built for re-auth); only gap was creating an account from a bare number. Added phone on AccountCreate (persisted in _create_account), start_phone_login(phone,label?) (digits->account_id/session_name, duplicate->SessionAlreadyExistsError->409), POST /accounts/start-login. Add-account wizard got a 'Номер телефона' method + dynamic 2/3-step stepper: phone -> account created -> proxy (existing step 2) -> step 3 requests+confirms code (code+2FA), run AFTER proxy assignment so the first Telegram connect uses the account's proxy (operator-confirmed ordering). New log-event phone_login_started (ru/en). Gates green: 1086 pytest / 207 vitest.

2026-07-11 operator-reported warming-card UI session (PR #212). The step rail was decorative (cycles_completed % 6) and could show a fake 'forming report' (Otchet) live step with no timer. Made the rail reflect the real engine cycle: activeStage maps persisted last_action (set_online/join->subscribe, read, react->reactions, stories, send_dm->stories fold), waiting states (sleeping/flood_wait/quarantine)->pause+countdown, idle->start. Reordered STAGES to emission order (subscribe,read,reactions,stories,pause) because the rail renders by index and stories runs after reactions; dropped the fake report step + its ru/en i18n labels. Backend now emits a real stories progress step: maybe_watch_stories returns whether a view landed, run_one_cycle advances via _watch_stories_step only when it did, stories added to _loop._PROGRESS_STEPS between react and send_dm. Grill caught the original premise error (current_phase is the multi-day lifecycle, not the in-cycle step). +2 backend / +6 vitest; 1081 pytest + 211 vitest + ruff/ty/tsc/eslint/steiger green. Sonnet 5 review clean over both increments.

2026-07-13 operator-reported warming-card fix (PR #236, merged 45f5e6e). A freshly-queued account showed a blinking «Подписка на каналы» during the cold-start wait (up to cold_start_spread_hours ~24h before the first cycle) — the engine was idle-sleeping, not subscribing. Loop now persists the computed first-run time to next_run_at (new _persist_cold_start_schedule, generation-CAS guarded so a restart resumes the same wait). Card detects the pre-start hold (active + cycles_completed==0 + no last_action) and shows «Выдержка перед стартом» + real live countdown, step rail idle until the first action. Operator chose the real countdown over a flat 24h. +2 backend / +1 vitest; subagent review clean. Same PR also fixed unrelated red CI (fresh CVEs): pillow 12.2.0->12.3.0 (lockfile bump, clears 5 CVEs); click PYSEC-2026-2132 unfixable (semgrep pins click~=8.1.8) so accepted via pip-audit --ignore-vuln + aislop _ACCEPTED_VULN_DEPS, both documented to drop once semgrep loosens its pin. Follow-up idea: move semgrep out of the runtime-audited dep set (uvx) to actually patch click.

Hardening batch (PR #264): reuse one per-account account_lock across warming+NC start/stop + session/tdata imports to close lifecycle/import races; NC flood/slow-mode cooldowns persisted via migration #34 and rehydrated on startup (durability, deliberately NOT an outbox); proxy assign/unassign/remove/rotate now evict the pooled Telethon client; account delete purges neurocomment_cooldowns + unlinks the .session; uploads rejected by size before read.

Neurocomment still loses posts on overload/idle/restart — no persistent incoming-post queue or catch-up; send↔DB idempotency reconciliation and backup readiness/off-site remain deferred (architecture, not patchable).

Warming cards show full account identity (name + phone/flag + profile photo) via shared entities/account helpers (accountDisplayName/accountInitials/AccountAvatar); WarmingAccountState & WarmedAccount now carry first_name/last_name/avatar_etag (#267/#268).
Session check now detects frozen Telegram accounts (authorized + get_me succeeds) via help.getAppConfig freeze_since_date + FrozenMethodInvalidError; adds permanent 'frozen' status (#266).

PR #272: account profile editing hardened after dual-agent audit. Stable error codes for profile/media edits (mirrors _channels.py table) instead of raw Telethon text; frozen/flood_wait status persisted at edit time via narrow update_account_status (session-check writer needs a fake TelegramSessionCheckResult, so not reused); avatar thumb/etag refreshed right after photo mutations; partial-success sync re-reads confirmed profile only on failure path (zero happy-path RPC). Deferred deliberately: premium bio 140 (needs premium detection), duplicate toast suppression (needs query-client meta), slow_mode/peer_flood do not change account status (per-chat limits).
